```{=html}
<div style="width:78%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="background:rgba(157,154,224,0.08);border-left:5px solid #9D9AE0;border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:1.3em 1.6em 1.4em;">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9D9AE0;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5em;">— practice 04 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:1.2em;font-weight:800;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:0.95em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
   Make it three pages.
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.6em;">

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(157,154,224,0.2);border-radius:10px;padding:0.8em 0.95em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9D9AE0;letter-spacing:0.14em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">STEP 01</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.5;">Add About + Projects pages. Nav bar links all three.</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(157,154,224,0.2);border-radius:10px;padding:0.8em 0.95em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9D9AE0;letter-spacing:0.14em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">STEP 02</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.5;">Hit a pitfall? Stop, re-prompt, don't push.</div>
   </div>

  </div>

  <div style="margin-top:1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;">
   ⏱ ~ 8 min &nbsp;·&nbsp; one prompt, three files
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
